sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83886" key="plinqh/i+on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλινθ-ήϊον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλινθεῖον, βορειότατον ζώνης π.,</foreign> of part of the zodiac, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
